# CLAUDE.md - Guidelines for AI-assisted development in tyk-docs

## Do Not Edit: Auto-generated Swagger Files

Files under `swagger/` are **auto-generated from code** and must not be edited directly in this repository. To make changes to Swagger/OpenAPI definitions, create a PR against the appropriate source code repository instead.

## Do Not Edit: Auto-generated Environment Variable Configuration Pages

The following environment variable configuration pages are **auto-generated** and must not be edited directly:

- `tyk-docs/content/tyk-oss-gateway/configuration.md`
- `tyk-docs/content/tyk-dashboard/configuration.md`
- `tyk-docs/content/tyk-pump/tyk-pump-configuration/tyk-pump-environment-variables.md`
- `tyk-docs/content/tyk-multi-data-centre/mdcb-configuration-options.md`
- `tyk-docs/content/tyk-configuration-reference/tyk-identity-broker-configuration.md`

## Do Not Edit: Tyk OAS API Reference

The Tyk OAS API reference pages at `api-management/gateway-config-tyk-oas` that contain `import XTykGateway from '/snippets/x-tyk-gateway.mdx';` are **auto-generated** and must not be edited directly.
